word: G5039 - τεκμήριον - tekmḗrion - tek-may'-ree-on - Infallible proof

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter / பெயர்ச்சொல் (அஃறிணை)
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Neuter of a presumed derivative of τεκμάρ tekmar (a goal or fixed limit); a token (as defining a fact), that is, criterion of certainty: - infallible proof.
